description: Database malware signatures for Clean Sweep CLI - WordPress and general database threats

signatures.name: SQL Injection UNION Attack
signatures.description: Detects UNION-based SQL injection attempts in database fields

signatures.name: SQL Injection OR-based Attack
signatures.description: Detects OR-based SQL injection patterns

signatures.name: SQL Injection Comment Attack
signatures.description: Detects SQL injection using comment truncation

signatures.name: SQL Injection Stacked Query
signatures.description: Detects stacked query SQL injection attempts

signatures.name: Base64 Encoded Payload
signatures.description: Detects base64 encoded content in database fields

signatures.name: Long Base64 String
signatures.description: Detects unusually long base64 encoded strings

signatures.name: Suspicious Script Tag in Option
signatures.description: Detects script tag injection in WordPress options

signatures.name: Inline Event Handler
signatures.description: Detects inline JavaScript event handlers

signatures.name: JavaScript eval() Usage
signatures.description: Detects JavaScript eval() usage in database content

signatures.name: Document Write Injection
signatures.description: Detects document.write usage for injections

signatures.name: iframe Injection
signatures.description: Detects iframe element injection

signatures.name: Meta Refresh Redirect
signatures.description: Detects meta refresh redirects in database content

signatures.name: Window Location Redirect
signatures.description: Detects JavaScript window location redirects

signatures.name: JavaScript Redirect
signatures.description: Detects generic JavaScript redirect patterns

signatures.name: Pharmaceutical Spam Link
signatures.description: Detects pharmaceutical spam links in database

signatures.name: SEO Spam Link Pattern
signatures.description: Detects common SEO spam link patterns

signatures.name: Adult Content Link
signatures.description: Detects adult content spam links

signatures.name: Link Farm Pattern
signatures.description: Detects suspicious link farm patterns in post content

signatures.name: Suspicious TLD Domain
signatures.description: Detects suspicious top-level domains often used in malware

signatures.name: IP-based URL
signatures.description: Detects direct IP address URLs (often malicious)

signatures.name: Encoded URL Payload
signatures.description: Detects URL-encoded suspicious payloads

signatures.name: PHP eval() in Serialized Data
signatures.description: Detects eval() patterns within serialized PHP data

signatures.name: Serialized PHP Object Injection
signatures.description: Detects serialized PHP object patterns that may indicate object injection

signatures.name: Base64 decode with eval
signatures.description: Detects base64 decode combined with eval execution

signatures.name: WordPress Options Backdoor
signatures.description: Detects suspicious patterns in WordPress wp_options table

signatures.name: Suspicious User Role
signatures.description: Detects suspicious administrator accounts

signatures.name: Cron Schedule Backdoor
signatures.description: Detects WordPress cron job scheduled malicious code

signatures.name: Cryptominer Configuration
signatures.description: Detects cryptocurrency miner configurations

signatures.name: CoinHive Script Reference
signatures.description: Detects CoinHive cryptocurrency miner script references
